relations.evidence: The Odoo *Events* application
The Odoo *Events* application provides the ability to customize and configure event templates
can be used to expedite the event-creation process
in order to quickly apply a series of settings and elements
in order to quickly apply a series of settings and elements
selected from an event form
Navigate to Events app --> Configuration
Configuration --> Event Templates
Event Templates page belongs to Event Templates sub-module
Exhibition is a pre-configured event template
Training is a pre-configured event template
Sport is a pre-configured event template
Template drop-down field on an event form
Drag-and-drop event templates using oi-draggable icon
Refer to the create_events documentation
Events app --> Configuration
Configuration --> Event Templates
clicking the New button... reveals a blank event template form
typing... in the Template field, and click Create and edit...
Clicking Create and edit... reveals a Create Template pop-up window
Event Templates page (Events app --> Configuration --> Event Templates)

relations.evidence: Booths tab on an event template form is... in the Odoo Events application.
The Booths tab on an event template form...
with the Product Type set to Event Booth.
To add a booth from the Booths tab... click Add a line.
click Add a line. Doing so reveals a blank Create Booths pop-up window.
Start by providing a Name for this booth in the corresponding field...
select an appropriate Booth Category from the drop-down field below.
the remaining fields on the Create Booths pop-up window (Currency, Product, and Price) autopopulate
the remaining fields on the Create Booths pop-up window (Currency, Product, and Price) autopopulate
the remaining fields on the Create Booths pop-up window (Currency, Product, and Price) autopopulate
based on information configured for that selected Booth Category.
based on information configured for that selected Booth Category.
based on information configured for that selected Booth Category.
Booth categories can be created and modified from the Booth Categories page...
To accomplish that, type the name... and select Create and edit... reveals a new Create Booth Category pop-up window.
For more information about those tabs, refer to the create_events documentation.
it is accessible on all event forms in the Odoo Events application

reveal all the existing event templates in the database
